text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're cleaning up after training, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look, my fine trainer. The seeker of twilight
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... My time... It's far from what my winning equation predicted.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, that is precisely why it's so interesting!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just as I walk the path of might, never straying
from my ideals, she holds fast to theory, never
straying from her convictions.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Her acts are worthy of admiration. But they hold
no candle to my immeasurable beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my splendor has no equal. Do you wish to
see it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me, her eyes burning with a desire to
get back out on the track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Nothing more need be said when it's
between us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us now begin our march down the Overlord's
path anew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let Opera O ride this surge of inspiration and
have her do extra training until she's satisfied.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You do not wish to see the Overlord's
advance?
choice_data_list: You need sufficient energy to advance.
You need sufficient energy to advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you insist these stout legs bide
their time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, a logical proposition. I shall tend to these
legs that traverse the Overlord's path with a rose
petal bath.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O rests her body and mind and tempers
her burning heart with a steaming bath.
